message:
test(unit): expand tui::query inline tests (3→61) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Comprehensive coverage for infer_agent_type (priority ordering, case
insensitivity, title vs cwd precedence), infer_pane_state (AltScreen,
CommandRunning, PromptActive priority chain), PaneView::from conversion,
QueryError Display variants, EventFilters, all view struct construction,
QueryClient default trait methods, and epoch_ms sanity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
